Declare one public prior range

Source: R/calibrate.R
pmx_prior.Rd

The range is the dominant sensitivity term in the whole design, so its provenance matters more than any other input. It must be chosen without inspecting the confidential data.

Usage

pmx_prior(range, source)

Arguments

range

Two increasing positive multipliers bracketing the correction factor, for example c(1/4, 4) for a prediction believed accurate to about four-fold.

source

Required provenance string.

Value

A pmx_prior.

On this page
